tweet.text: I’m retired homeboy. The Ali act getting passed wont help me, but it will help current and futures fighters get paid their market value. A better reason to vote for Harris is for our Democracy. Having Trump as dictator doesn’t sounds like much fun for America https://t.co/75h8Jsoo19
Not saying Norway is perfect, but usually socialism is compared to Venezuela rather than a country that makes it work pretty good for them. https://t.co/O40mZWX9ma

For me policies take a backseat to the fact Trump tried to overthrow our government and election. There should be no “do overs” for someone that disrespects our country like he did. America will make it through bad policies and bad leaders, but not with out our democracy https://t.co/ZyDJb81ano

Sorry, I must have misunderstood his joke Jan 6th when he tried to stop the transfer of power in a free and fair election. I guess I dont find that humorous. Or all the court cases following that stated it was a free and fair election. Messing with our democracy isn’t funny to me https://t.co/PjV5RBQ1ud
RT @Wokepotayto: @MikeJCzapla @GrayMaynard Guy still says he won the last election he ain't gonna leave if he wins again . Sorry you like s…
RT @john4john4john: @MikeJCzapla @GrayMaynard He schemed to have his vice president count fake ballots. He even had a back up in Grassley…
RT @Acyn: Judge Luttig: There is nothing more important than a president’s sacred obligations to preserve and protect American democracy, t…
RT @mcpli: It seems like saying you will use the US military against US citizens domestically should be the big news story or the day.
So what. Didn’t hitler have like 42 assassination plots against him. Maybe like 6 attempts. That logic is terrible https://t.co/iyELN9f2kP

RT @MMAFA: Anything else is literally not a sport, is a recipe for monopoly, and is participating in promoter exploitation of fighters.
#…

Maybe dictatorship wording was a little off. But, IMO he’s surrounding himself with people that will not transfer the power of a free and fair election next time. I think Jan 6 event was planned to not transfer the power, but was botched. That’s why Mile Pence isn’t his VP now https://t.co/EHQhNkLzcW
Yup. 🎯 https://t.co/XnBo5wDTIi
RT @davidfrum: Below is a fascinating example of Trump supporters' fantasy world. They tell a story of Trump charity to Nelson Mandela that…
RT @Denis_Buchholz: Trump stole 2.8 million from veterans charity! Found guilty in court and must pay it back

I’ve never really paid attention. I just try to put out facts and some opinions. MAGA crowd gets pretty angry about the facts part, and the opinion, but facts aren’t very friendly to them https://t.co/43Y4isqZfT
MAHA is such a joke. 2 things Trump doesn’t give a fuck about, people health and the environment. Lost all respect for @RealRFKJR2024 selling his soul for some power and a job https://t.co/Tkf2EZc2aD
We learned a long time ago internet tough guys are a waste of time https://t.co/uYo86C8QSS

Back on the tampon thing again. You guys will just keep beaten a dead horse. Women’s prison thing…… I have no idea what you’re talking about. It sounds like stupid MAGA talking point and it’s hard to keep up with all of those https://t.co/E3ooz07ejg
Did Donald Trump lose the 2020 election? True or False https://t.co/w83yK2kGX2

Haven’t really thought about prison policies that much. I think you should play sports with the gender you’re born with if that answers your question. I think prison there’s a lot of raping going on in general https://t.co/jQAWniqoZR
Like I said, facts are hard for you guys. All good, believe what you want https://t.co/pu1UlWwFUp
Great source 🤦 https://t.co/GaK5MjgEog

I can honestly say if she doesn’t lead our country correctly, we can vote her out. No one can say that for Trump. There’s a chance he could leave, there’s a chance he overthrows the American government. MAGA people like that chance https://t.co/SoaAQMaaIc
No, he couldn’t do it last time. This time he has a new VP and whole new administration that will follow through https://t.co/PHt12HMurk
💯 nobody ever says that. Thank you https://t.co/TDOmmQ1Ctz

My answer was, I have no idea about that issue. Hard to respond to something with my only information is what you said. I gave you an answer about sports….. I have no idea about prison my man. It’s a weird question that I don’t want to think about https://t.co/AwNBzH8uoc
